strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with experience in event-driven architectures and microservices
Demonstrated ability to build and operate production-grade AI-agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows)
Proven track record of scaling engineering teams and implementing disciplined development practices (CI/CD, TDD, pair programming)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience in regulated environments
No explicit mention of real-time inference systems or financial-grade observability in past roles
Agents work appears to be tooling-focused (MCP, code generators) rather than full-scale multi-agent systems for fintech operations
response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and AI-agent infrastructure expertise, including recent work on MCP frameworks and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, his experience lacks direct fintech or credit-risk system exposure in regulated settings, and his agentic work appears more tooling-oriented than full-scale multi-agent systems for fintech operations. His engineering leadership is evident but not specifically in fintech scale-ups.
